skills.name: Corrupted Velocity I
skills.description: Tap into the Negative Speed Force for a speed boost.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +140% (1.4x). Sprinting provides an additional +30% boost that accelerates over time.

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity II
skills.description: Your speed becomes more potent and parasitic.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +240% (2.4x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity III
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +400% (4.0x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity IV
skills.description: You move with chaotic, entropic energy.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +600% (6.0x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity V
skills.description: Your speed begins to warp time around you.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +800% (8.0x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity VI
skills.description: Become a living paradox, reaching the peak of negative speed.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +900% (9.0x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity VII
skills.description: Your connection to the Negative Speed Force deepens.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +1000% (10.0x).

skills.name: Corrupted Velocity VIII
skills.description: You have mastered the Negative Speed Force.
skills.info_description: Increases your base speed multiplier to +1200% (12.0x).

skills.name: Kinetic Kickstart
skills.description: Instantly reach your maximum negative speed.
skills.info_description: Removes the acceleration from the sprinting speed boost, making it instant. Can be toggled off in the skill tree.
